title: Hello!
text:
Hi there! Welcome to my teaching and training website. This is a repository for all the teaching and training materials that I am currently using or have previously delivered.
My background is in Biomedical Engineering, and my previous work focused on vascular mechanobiology and tissue engineering. Currently, my research interests include:

Cardiovascular Mechanobiology and Tissue Engineering
Data Science Education in Low-Resource Settings
Accessible Data Visualization

I am also a Certified Carpentries Instructor and a trainer with the Digital Research Academy. In these roles my goal is to train learners on the basics of computational thinking, and I am an ardent promoter of using open-source tools (such as R/Python) to solve data analysis and visualization problems.
